title: Region Health Matrix & Failover
summary: Per-region realtime latency telemetry + admin matrix UI + manual failover pin. Builds on PR-N region sharding.
db_objects: table public.realtime_region_heartbeats (admin SELECT, owner INSERT, 30d prune)
rpc public.record_realtime_heartbeat(region, partition, latency_ms) → authenticated+anon, SECURITY DEFINER, sanitized
rpc public.admin_get_realtime_region_health() → 3-region matrix, last 5min, active_users + avg/p95
client_changes: src/packages/realtime/heartbeat.ts (new) — fire-and-forget reporter, per-channel once, 60s global debounce
src/packages/realtime/index.ts — withHeartbeat(part, key, opts) wraps onStatus to measure subscribe→live latency
src/pages/admin/_nav.ts — 🌍 리전 헬스 nav item under 운영

verification.operator_isolation: pass (RegionHealth bundled into operator chunk via pages/admin/** glob)
